column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, looking up at a cherry blossom tree, eyes wide with wonder, petals falling" | TEXT="咲いてる" P2: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, trying to catch a falling cherry petal with both hands, clumsy movement" | TEXT="待て待てー" P3: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, successfully caught a petal, showing it proudly to the camera" | TEXT="捕獲完了" P4: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, smelling a cherry blossom softly, peaceful expression" | TEXT="春の匂い" P5: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, dancing lightly among falling cherry blossoms, joyful" | TEXT="浮かれております" P6: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, sitting under a cherry tree on a picnic sheet, sipping tea" | TEXT="至福のひととき" P7: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, wearing cherry blossom twigs like antlers, looking silly" | TEXT="桜の妖精です" P8: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, blowing a handful of cherry petals towards the camera" | TEXT="春のおすそわけ" P9: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, rolling on a carpet of fallen pink petals, extremely relaxed" | TEXT="最高すぎる"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, running frantically to catch swirling petals in the wind" | TEXT="逃がさん" P2: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, slipping on wet cherry petals on the ground, comedic fall" | TEXT="滑るぅ" P3: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, buried under a massive pile of cherry petals, only eyes visible" | TEXT="埋もれました" P4: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, aggressively throwing petals in the air like confetti" | TEXT="祝祭じゃ" P5: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, catching a petal in his mouth by mistake, choking playfully" | TEXT="食べた" P6: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, trying to sweep petals with a broom but wind blows them back" | TEXT="キリがない" P7: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, making a snow angel but with pink cherry petals" | TEXT="花びらエンジェル" P8: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, meditating calmly while a single petal lands on his bald head" | TEXT="無の境地" P9: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, taking a selfie with a perfect cherry blossom background, peace sign" | TEXT="映えてる"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, looking up at illuminated night cherry blossoms, awestruck" | TEXT="綺麗だ" P2: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, holding a warm drink under the night cherry trees, shivering a bit" | TEXT="夜は冷えるな" P3: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, looking melancholic as a gust of wind blows many petals away" | TEXT="散りゆく運命" P4: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, trying to glue a fallen petal back onto the tree branch with tape" | TEXT="戻れ" P5: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, singing emotionally loudly holding a microphone under the blossoms" | TEXT="春の歌" P6: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, crying romantically while watching petals fall in moonlight" | TEXT="美しすぎる" P7: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, sleeping peacefully on a bench under the night cherry blossoms" | TEXT="おやすみ" P8: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, pointing at the moon through the cherry branches" | TEXT="月と桜" P9: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, waving goodbye to the fading cherry blossom trees" | TEXT="また来年"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, checking a mirror and finding a pink petal stuck precisely on his forehead" | TEXT="なんだこれ" P2: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, sneezing powerfully and a cloud of petals blasts from his mouth" | TEXT="ぶくしっ" P3: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, a bird sits on his head holding a cherry blossom twig" | TEXT="鳥さん" P4: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, dressed as a cherry tree, camouflaging, winking" | TEXT="同化中" P5: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, getting frightened by a sudden gust of wind snapping a small branch" | TEXT="ビクッ" P6: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, offering a cherry blossom to a stray cat, cat ignores him" | TEXT="振られた" P7: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, accidentally sitting on a wet muddy petal, examining his hip" | TEXT="汚れた" P8: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, carefully carrying a single petal but tripping and dropping it" | TEXT="ああっ" P9: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, frantically chasing the dropped petal on hands and knees" | TEXT="待ってくれ"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, holding a large heart shaped arrangement of cherry petals" | TEXT="大好き" P2: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, bowing deeply while pink petals rain down purely, apologetic" | TEXT="ごめんね" P3: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, giving a thumbs up from behind a beautiful cherry tree branch" | TEXT="よろしく" P4: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, saluting vigorously, a petal stuck on his cheek" | TEXT="了解しました" P5: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, holding a sign made of cherry petals saying OK" | TEXT="オーケー" P6: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, crossing arms indicating NO, surrounded by falling petals" | TEXT="ダメです" P7: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, clapping hands joyfully, petals fluttering around" | TEXT="おめでとう" P8: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, peeking shyly from behind a large cherry blossom trunk" | TEXT="チラッ" P9: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, raising both arms in victory, petals swarming like a tornado" | TEXT="やったー"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, holding on tightly to the trunk of a cherry tree, refusing to leave" | TEXT="帰りたくない" P2: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, desperately collecting fallen petals into a large plastic bag" | TEXT="集めておく" P3: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, pressing a precious cherry petal inside a heavy book" | TEXT="保存します" P4: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, drawing a picture of the cherry tree on a canvas with a beret" | TEXT="芸術だ" P5: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, looking dramatically into the distance, cherry petals blowing past" | TEXT="また会おう" P6: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, jumping high trying to reach the last remaining blossom" | TEXT="届かない" P7: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, lying on his back, exhausted but satisfied after playing with petals" | TEXT="燃え尽きた" P8: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, holding a small cherry blossom seedling in a pot, hopeful" | TEXT="育てる" P9: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, giving a cool goodbye salute, wearing sunglasses, petals falling" | TEXT="あばよ"
